mapper.sql: id, name, image_url, major_id, course_type, status, recommended, sort, learning_objectives, introduction, months_required, total_price, is_free, is_free_limited, free_start_time, free_end_time, allow_trial, teacher, teacher_id, student_count, view_count, chapter_count, question_count, exam_count, video_count, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_course WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_course WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_course (name, image_url, major_id, course_type, status, recommended, sort, learning_objectives, introduction, months_required, total_price, is_free, is_free_limited, free_start_time, free_end_time, allow_trial, teacher, teacher_id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{imageUrl}, #{majorId}, #{courseType}, #{status}, #{recommended}, #{sort}, #{learningObjectives}, #{introduction}, #{monthsRequired}, #{totalPrice}, #{isFree}, #{isFreeLimited}, #{freeStartTime}, #{freeEndTime}, #{allowTrial}, #{teacher}, #{teacherId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_course SET name = #{name}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, major_id = #{majorId}, course_type = #{courseType}, status = #{status}, recommended = #{recommended}, sort = #{sort}, learning_objectives = #{learningObjectives}, introduction = #{introduction}, months_required = #{monthsRequired}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, is_free = #{isFree}, is_free_limited = #{isFreeLimited}, free_start_time = #{freeStartTime}, free_end_time = #{freeEndTime}, allow_trial = #{allowTrial}, teacher = #{teacher}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_course SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_course SET deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_course SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_course SET recommended = #{recommended} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_course WHERE recommended = 1 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, name, image_url, course_type, teacher, view_count, is_free, recommended FROM edu_course WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0
AND recommended = 1
AND is_free = 1
AND major_id = #{cateId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY view_count DESC, sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT FROM edu_course WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM edu_course WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
